mapper.sql: userId, openId, gzhOpenId, zfbOpenId, nickname, headImgUrl, level, qrCode, wristId, sex, height, weight, phone, interest, userSign, faceStatus, auditStatus, createdDate,nowStoreId
mapper.select: select userId, openId, gzhOpenId, zfbOpenId, nickname, headImgUrl, level, qrCode, wristId, sex, height, weight, phone, interest, userSign, faceStatus,auditStatus,deviceToken, iosUserId, createdDate, wtOpenId, wtState, contractId, contractTime,nowStoreId from user_info where userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and isDel=0
mapper.insert: insert into user_info (userId, openId, nickname, headImgUrl, level, qrCode, wristId, sex, height, weight, phone, interest, userSign, createdDate) values (#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{openId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{headImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{level,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{qrCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{wristId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sex,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{height,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{weight,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{interest,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userSign,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into user_info
userId,
openId,
gzhOpenId,
zfbOpenId,
nickname,
headImgUrl,
level,
qrCode,
wristId,
sex,
height,
weight,
phone,
password,
interest,
userSign,
iosUserId,
createdDate,
nowStoreId,
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{openId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{gzhOpenId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{zfbOpenId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{headImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{level,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{qrCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{wristId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sex,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{height,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{weight,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{interest,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userSign,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{iosUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{nowStoreId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
mapper.update:
update user_info
openId = #{openId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
nickname = #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
headImgUrl = #{headImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
level = #{level,jdbcType=TINYINT},
qrCode = #{qrCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
wristId = #{wristId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sex = #{sex,jdbcType=TINYINT},
height = #{height,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
weight = #{weight,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
birthday = #{birthday,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
password = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rongCloudId = #{rongCloudId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rongCloudToken = #{rongCloudToken,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
deviceToken = #{deviceToken,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
interest = #{interest,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
userSign = #{userSign,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
faceStatus = #{faceStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
auditStatus = #{auditStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
iosUserId = #{iosUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
nowStoreId = #{nowStoreId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
where userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update user_info
rongCloudId = #{rongCloudId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rongCloudToken = #{rongCloudToken,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update user_info
openId = #{openId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
gzhOpenId = #{gzhOpenId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
zfbOpenId = #{zfbOpenId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
iosUserId = #{iosUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
nowStoreId = #{nowStoreId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
deviceToken = #{deviceToken,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
auditStatus = #{auditStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
wtState = #{wtState,jdbcType=INTEGER},
contractId = #{contractId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
contractTime = #{contractTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
nickname = #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select userId, nickname, qrCode, headImgUrl, sex, wtState, contractId, ui.userSign, ui.auditStatus,ui.nowStoreId, (select attentionStatus from user_attention ua where ua.attentedId = ui.userId and ua.observerId = #{myId} and ua.attentionStatus=1) as attentionStatus, (select ifnull(sumPoints,0) from user_points up where up.userId = ui.userId) points, (select count(*) from user_attention ua where ua.observerId = ui.userId and ua.attentionStatus = 1 ) attentions, (select count(*) from user_attention ua where ua.attentedId = ui.userId and ua.attentionStatus = 1 ) fans, (select service_tel from about_us limit 1) as csPhone, (select count(*) from store_attention sa where sa.observerId = ui.userId and sa.attentionStatus = 1 ) groups from user_info ui where ui.userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and ui.isDel=0
select dm.price from data_map dm where dm.idxLabel = 2 and dm.nextLabel = 2 and dm.val <= #{userEnergy} order by dm.val desc LIMIT 1

select dm.price, dm.dataName, dm.val, ifnull(((select d.val from data_map d where d.idxLabel = 2 and d.nextLabel = 2 and d.price=(dm.price+1) limit 1) - #{userEnergy}),0) as proEnergy, ifnull((select ROUND(1-proEnergy/(d.val-dm.val),2) from data_map d where d.idxLabel = 2 and d.nextLabel = 2 and d.price=(dm.price+1) limit 1),0) as percent, (select description from data_map where idxLabel = 2 and nextLabel = 1) as rule from data_map dm where dm.idxLabel = 2 and dm.nextLabel = 2 and dm.val <= #{userEnergy} order by dm.val desc LIMIT 1
select userId,nickname,headImgUrl from user_info where phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and isDel=0

select userId, openId, nickname, phone, password, sex,headImgUrl,wristId, rongCloudId,rongCloudToken,height,weight, faceStatus,auditStatus,iosUserId,nowStoreId from user_info where iosUserId = #{iosUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and isDel=0
select * from user_info where userId = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and isDel=0

select userId, nickname, phone, password,wristId, sex,headImgUrl,rongCloudId,rongCloudToken, deviceToken, height,weight, faceStatus,auditStatus,nowStoreId from user_info where phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND password = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and isDel=0
SELECT userId, userType,nickname,phone, height,weight,sex, birthday,wristId,faceStatus,headImgUrl,interest,userSign,birthday,auditStatus,nowStoreId FROM user_info where userId= #{userId} and isDel=0

select userId, openId, nickname, phone, password, sex,headImgUrl,wristId,rongCloudId,rongCloudToken,height,weight, faceStatus,auditStatus,nowStoreId from user_info where openId = #{openId} and isDel=0

select userId, zfbOpenId as openId, nickname, phone, password, sex,headImgUrl,wristId,rongCloudId,rongCloudToken,height,weight, faceStatus,auditStatus,nowStoreId from user_info where zfbOpenId = #{openId} and isDel=0

select userId, gzhOpenId as openId, nickname, phone, password, sex,headImgUrl,wristId,rongCloudId,rongCloudToken,height,weight, faceStatus,auditStatus,nowStoreId from user_info where gzhOpenId = #{openId} and isDel=0
select userId, nickname, phone, headImgUrl from user_info where phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and isDel=0
SELECT * FROM user_info WHERE wristId = #{cardid} and isDel=0
mapper.update: update user_info set faceStatus = 1 where userId = #{userId} and isDel=0
mapper.select: select faceStatus, wristId,nickname,phone from user_info where userId = #{userId} and isDel=0
select storeId from device where proxyId = #{userId} and status <> 3 limit 1
select storeAddressId from device where proxyId = #{userId} and status in (0,1,2) limit 1
mapper.update:
update user_info
wtOpenId = #{wtOpenId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
wtState = #{wtState,jdbcType=INTEGER},
contractId = #{contractId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
contractTime = now()
where userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update user_info
wtState = #{wtState,jdbcType=INTEGER},
contractId = #{contractId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
contractTime = now()
where wtOpenId = #{wtOpenId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select userId from user_info where contractId = #{contractId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and isDel=0 limit 1

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM store_address s inner join device d on d.storeAddressId=s.storeAddrId inner join user_info u on u.userId=d.proxyId
and u.isDel = 0
and s.storeAddrId = #{storeAddressId}
AND HaveCommonElements(s.storeAddrId, #{storeAddressIds})
) AS userCount,
(SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT proxyId) FROM device
and validityDate > CURDATE()
and find_in_set(#{storeAddressId}, storeAddrIds)
AND HaveCommonElements(storeAddrIds, #{storeAddressIds})
) AS cardCount,
(SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT proxyId) FROM device
and validityDate > CURDATE() and buyCount > 1
and find_in_set(#{storeAddressId}, storeAddrIds)
AND HaveCommonElements(storeAddrIds, #{storeAddressIds})
) AS cardReNewCount
